judge_reasoning: Coverage and noise handling are clean: all 8 messages triaged, m4 correctly labeled ignore. m2 is correctly flagged high. The main rubric miss is m8: the agent labeled it ignore rather than high, failing criterion 2 exactly as written, even though the fraud was identified in a separate note. Calibration also slips: m1 (Priya renewal) is elevated to high when the rubric calls for med/low, and m7 (Ivy standup deck order) is elevated to high when the rubric calls for med/low.
